title: Disable Announce Advancement
description: Mod that disables annoying notifications about achievements in the chat (like a command /gamerule announceadvancement fals) But it works constantly both when creating a new world and when entering existing ones
body: Minecraft mod that disables annoying notifications about achievements in the chat. It is useful in large modpacks, where a lot of garbage is thrown when you log in to the chat, that the mod is loaded, that you are starting a new journey, and so on. An analog of the /gamerule announcement false command, which always works without having to enter this command every time you create or enter your world
